title: Arrzee's Superhero Multiverse
description: A Palladium addon featuring suits and powers from Arrzee's Enhanced SMP!
body:

# Season 3 Episode 1 Release!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LkaM0fNNa7w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Arrzee's Multiverse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa05be76a5b6276fbae588ab8f10223ae554310_0.webp)

**A Palladium Addon adding superpowers and abilities from [Arrzee's Enhanced SMP!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZgEdJ-i0Iew&list=PLB2BswZeb7v2Oqtek9jJHJJ881Yas4uW9)**

Arrzee's Multiverse is an addon for Palladium that adds various blocks, effects, interactions, and superpowers featured on Arrzee's Enhanced SMP! Updates will come as the story develops.

For information on how to obtain each power, skip to the appropriate section in the YouTube video!

# Superpowers
## Speedforce
- Adjustible Speed, Speed Leveling
- Aerokinesis (Tornado Arms)
- Wall Running
- Speed Punches
- Phasing
- Toggle Shield (Requires Suit)
- Enter Speedforce (DISABLED)

## Electricity Conduction
- Lightning Bolt
- Lightning Beam
- Toggle Shield (Requires Suit)
- Current Burst (Area of Effect Explosion)

## Electric Gamma Radiation
- Gamma Transformation
- Thunder Clap
- Ground Smash
- Pick Up Entity (DISABLED)
- Leap

## Soul Fire Magic
- Toggle Magic
- Forcefield
- Summon Daggers
- Soul Energy Bar (Increases with damage)

## Umbrakinesis
- Dark Pulse
- Toggle Shadow Form
- Shadow Dome
- Toggle Shadow Blade

## Size-Manipulation Suits
## Redstone Mech Mk1
- Aim & Fire Beam
- Grenade
- Alter Size (Scroll Wheel)
- Miniaturize Suit

## Redstone Mech Mk2
- Toggle Suit On/Off
- Aim & Fire Laser
- Grenade
- Alter Size (Scroll Wheel)
- Miniaturize Suit

## Nanotech Suits
## Rainbow Defender
- Defensive Blasts
- Toggle Shield
- Toggle Blade

## Iron Prism
- Add / Remove Arrow
- Toggle Prism Blade
- Aim and Fire Arrows
- Cycle Arrows (Scroll Wheel)

## Nuclear Fusion
- Fire Ball
- Fire Beam
- Nuclear Energy Release

## Napturgy
- REM Beam (Requires Suit)
- Take a Power Nap

## Power Negation (Requires Dampened)
- Toggle Dagger
- Forcefield
- Charged Jump
- Toggle Shadow Form
- Ranged Dampen

## Warpwave Manipulation / Breacher
- Aim & Fire Blast
- Create Breach
- Concussive Blast
- Configure Breach
- Adjust Intensity

## Cosmic Enhancement
- Cosmic Beam
- Binary Mode

## Asguardian (Sabri's Thor)
- Stormbreaker
- Bifrost Teleportation
- Summon Lightning Slam
- 
## Orange Lantern Ring
- Alien Form
- Mace Construct
- Energy Shield
- Energy Shot
- Greed/Loot-Based Energy Bar

## Hyperior (Based on Homelander)
- Laser Eyes
- Sonic Scream
- Ground Slam
- Chokehold
- Break Restraints
- Rage Meter

## Witherblade (Based on Daredevil & Wolverine)
- Witherbone Claws
- Leap
- Wall Climbing
- Regeneration

## Circuit (Based on The Winter Soldier)
- Leap & Crash

## Impasse (Based on Gridlock & Juggernaut)
- Unstoppable
- Thunder Clap
- Ground Shake

## Steelwing (Based on The Falcon)
- Glider Wings
- Jet Boost
- Gun Holster

## Cypherius
- Laser Blast
- Invisibility
- Essentium Spear

## Proto (Based on The Atom/Ant-Man)
- Size Change
- Toggle Blades
- Levitation Shot
